data.body:
TEST-INFRA MAP (for held-out TDD). make test = pytest -m 'not integration not external' -q. Verdict tests are OFFLINE via rebar.llm.runner.FakeRunner(structured=canned_dict); close-path via monkeypatch rebar.llm.verify_completion.
- 74d9 (completion enumerate-all): mirror tests/interfaces/store/test_completion_verifier.py (_verify helper + FakeRunner); prompt target src/rebar/llm/reviewers/completion_verifier.md 'Verdict & findings' ~L163 'one finding per FAILING requirement'.
- 24ec (FAIL sidecar): mirror src/rebar/llm/plan_review/sidecar.py (emit/prune/latest, REVIEW_RESULT, RETAIN_PER_TICKET=10, reducer-ignored); close-path test tests/interfaces/lifecycle/test_completion_gate.py (FAIL stub L79-87, _enable toml). transition_close.py _completion_precheck.
- f32e (code-v3): tests/unit/test_impact_code.py (pure impact_code({attrs})==float); IMPACT_MODEL_VERSION assertion tests/unit/test_impact_model_versioning.py; fixture tests/unit/fixtures/code_review_impact_labels.jsonl; ab gate docs/experiments/ab_impact_model.py. decide.py:230 impact_code, maint binaries 198-205.
- d4cf (G7): registry.py applies() L318 (applies_at.scope leaf/container); validate_packaged_routing() must stay []; blocking-posture approved set in test_impact_model_versioning.py (add G7 there ONLY if blocking; shipping advisory 0.95 so NOT). mirror tests/unit/test_criteria_overlay.py.
- a8e5 (grounding hardening): additive verification-contract test tests/unit/test_review_kernel.py:176-207 (extend expected sets, base/code byte-identical); cited-reference veto decide.py:318-326 + tests test_review_kernel.py:84; det_floor.py + test_plan_review.py probes.
- a37b (drift-refresh default): _config_schema.py:250 progressive_drift_refresh=False->True; default-pinning tests tests/interfaces/lifecycle/test_plan_review_gate.py:907 test_progressive_drift_refresh_is_opt_in + _enable(progressive=) L110 (flip meaning); mirror default-ON pattern test_code_review_region_gate.py:108.
